title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: Casey West demonstrates an architectural decision for multi-agent systems that minimizes LLM calls by using deterministic algorithms instead. The approach, illustrated through a 1000-agent marathon-planning system, uses callbacks to skip model invocation where domain logic suffices, reducing both compute costs and latency.
